channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Why drinking more water didn’t prevent kidney stones
item.description: Kidney stones are notoriously painful—and frustratingly common, with many people facing repeat episodes. A massive new study tested whether a high-tec...

item.title: Don’t toss cannabis leaves: Scientists found rare compounds with medical potential
item.description: Scientists have uncovered a surprising new layer of complexity in Cannabis, identifying dozens of previously unknown compounds—including the first-eve...

item.title: Surprising obesity discovery rewrites decades of fat metabolism science
item.description: A key protein involved in fat metabolism has been found to do more than scientists once thought. Instead of just releasing fat, it helps maintain heal...

item.title: Hidden ocean heat is creeping toward Antarctica’s fragile ice shelves
item.description: Deep beneath the Southern Ocean, a quiet but alarming shift is underway: warm water is creeping closer to Antarctica, and scientists are now seeing it...
